name: proc_tampering_susp_process_hollowing
raw_query: any where winlog.event_data.Type:"Image is replaced" and (not (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\wbem\\WMIADAP.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\wbem\\WMIADAP.exe*"))) and (not ((process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Opera\\*" and process.executable:"*\\opera.exe") or process.executable:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe"))
